title: Buttery Argentinian Flax Eggs Wrap
description: A cozy and buttery wrap featuring flax eggs, packed with protein and loaded with flavor for a pescatarian-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Flax Eggs
ingredients.notes: Replace regular eggs as flax eggs bind together and are vegan

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For binding and flavoring the flax eggs

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Enhances the natural taste of the flax eggs

ingredients.name: Chopped Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: Add a bit of crunch and color to the wrap

ingredients.name: Chopped Cucumber
ingredients.notes: Provides a cool, fresh contrast in taste and texture

ingredients.name: Capers
ingredients.notes: Add a tangy burst of flavor to the wrap

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Delivers a sweet, savory kick to the wrap

ingredients.name: Jalapeno Slices
ingredients.notes: For a touch of heat and flavor

ingredients.name: Chives (optional)
ingredients.notes: Adds freshness and color to the wrap

instructions: Beat flax eggs with olive oil in a bowl.
Stir in all-purpose flour and salt until smooth.
Heat pan over medium heat. Pour mixture into pan and let cook for about 1-2 minutes on each side or until golden brown and set.
While wraps are cooking, prepare toppings by combining bell pepper, cucumber, capers, red onion, jalapeno slices (if using), and chives in a bowl.
To assemble: Spread flax eggs evenly onto wrap. Top with the prepared vegetables mixture.
Serve immediately as a breakfast or lunch wrap.
